case_title: JIN ZHAO YU VS. ADAM SLOWIK

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-29-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SLOWIK, ADAM
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY YU, JIN ZHAO AS TO DEFENDANT SLOWIK, ADAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY YU, JIN ZHAO SLOWIK, ADAM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, JIN ZHAO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SLOWIK, ADAM PLAINTIFF DID NOT EXERCISE DUE CAUTION IN ATTEMPTING TO PASS DEFENDANT AND THEREFORE IS NOT ENTITLED TO RECOVERY FOR HIS CAR DAMAGES OR MEDICAL BILLS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2008 - JUDGMENT.
